articles.author: Jon Brodkin
articles.title: Starlink satellite breaks apart into "tens of objects"; SpaceX confirms "anomaly" - Ars Technica
articles.description: Satellite failure cause is unexplained after second "fragment creation event."

articles.author: Ivan Mehta
articles.title: Google is now letting users in the US change their Gmail address - TechCrunch
articles.description: Users will be able to change their username only once every 12 months. Plus, they won't be able to delete their new email address for that period of time.
articles.content:
Google said on Tuesday that it is now rolling out a way for users in the U.S. to change their Gmail address without starting over or losing access to their data.
